name: Barbados Gaming Alliance (BGA)
description: Facebook community for people in Barbados interested in gaming, discussion, and connecting around the local gaming scene.

name: GDG Bridgetown
description: Google Developer Group chapter in Bridgetown for developers interested in Google technologies, events, and community learning.

name: Hackers & Founders Santo Domingo
description: Santo Domingo tech community sharing events, updates, and networking opportunities through its public social channels.

name: Guyana Technology User Group
description: Facebook community for IT professionals and enthusiasts in Guyana to connect around local tech discussions and networking.

name: STEMGuyana
description: Guyana-based STEM organization providing clubs, AI programs, robotics, and technology education for youth across the country.

name: AWS User Group Jamaica
description: Community for people in Jamaica interested in Amazon Web Services, cloud technologies, and shared learning.

name: Docker Jamaica
description: Community for developers and ops engineers in Jamaica who are using and learning about Docker and containers.

name: Jamaica Artificial Intelligence Association
description: Community for Jamaicans interested in AI and its practical applications, with regular discussions and learning sessions.

name: Jamaica Game Developer Society
description: Coalition supporting Jamaica's game development ecosystem through education, networking, showcases, and collaboration.

name: Jamaica Software Developers Association
description: Facebook group for Jamaica-based developers and tech enthusiasts to connect, share opportunities, and discuss the industry.

name: Jamaica Technology & Digital Alliance (JTDA)
description: Jamaica industry alliance focused on advancing the local technology ecosystem, digital development, and collaboration.

name: Jamaican Developers Community
description: Community of Jamaican tech enthusiasts focused on skill-building, knowledge-sharing, and collaboration, with a current shift toward Caribbean Tech Connect.

name: Kingston WordPress Meetup
description: Jamaica-based WordPress community for learning, sharing, and connecting around websites, publishing, and web development.

name: Python Jamaica
description: Community for people in Jamaica interested in Python, including automation, web development, and data work.

name: SiliconCaribe
description: Jamaica-based platform focused on Caribbean startups, innovation, and the regional tech entrepreneurship ecosystem.

name: Tech Chat Jamaica
description: General Facebook community for people in Jamaica to discuss tech topics, opportunities, and local happenings.

name: UX Designer Network Jamaica
description: Community for Jamaica-based UX and product designers to collaborate, learn, and discover project or job opportunities.

name: Caribbean Developers
description: Private Facebook group for software developers who have a background or interest in the Caribbean region.

name: Caribbean Girls Hack
description: Regional initiative focused on bridging the gender digital divide by engaging and upskilling girls and young women.

name: Caribbean Network Operators Group (CaribNOG)
description: Regional network operators community focused on exchanging technical knowledge, building capacity, and supporting Caribbean internet infrastructure.

name: Caribbean Science Foundation
description: Regional organization using science, engineering, and technology programs to support education, innovation, and economic development in the Caribbean.

name: Caribbean Tech Collective
description: Regional collective connecting Caribbean tech talent through community, career development, and professional networking.

name: Caribbean Tech Connect
description: Regional community connecting Caribbean developers, creators, and tech professionals through content, events, and collaboration.

name: Jammin
description: Regional community space for Caribbean game jams, game developers, and related collaboration.

name: Palisadoes
description: Regional technology community centered on engineering leadership, knowledge sharing, and collaboration across the Caribbean.

name: Women in InfoSec Caribbean
description: Regional initiative supporting Caribbean women and girls who want to develop careers in information security.

name: Women in Tech Caribbean
description: Regional community connecting Caribbean women in tech at home and in the diaspora for networking and growth.

name: FinTechTT
description: Non-profit association that brings together fintech stakeholders in Trinidad and Tobago to collaborate, network, and shape the industry.

name: Game Developers Trinidad and Tobago
description: Community for game developers and enthusiasts in Trinidad and Tobago to connect, share work, and support the local games ecosystem.

name: GDG Port of Spain
description: Google Developer Group chapter in Port of Spain for developers interested in Google technologies, events, and community learning.

name: Internet Society Trinidad and Tobago
description: Trinidad and Tobago chapter of the Internet Society focused on internet development, digital inclusion, and related community initiatives.

name: PyData T&T
description: Trinidad and Tobago data community for people learning and practicing data science, analytics, machine learning, and Python.

name: The Developers' Hub (D'Hub)
description: Government-supported developer initiative in Trinidad and Tobago focused on digital skills, learning, and local ecosystem support.

name: Women in Data Science Trinidad and Tobago
description: Trinidad and Tobago initiative that supports women and girls in data science through workshops, networking, and skill-building.
